title: How Claude Code's Creator ACTUALLY Automates his work
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down how Boris Cherny, creator of Claude Code, uses the platform's Skills feature to automate work through agents, hooks, and loops. The video reverse-engineers Cherny's system by analyzing his interviews and configuration to identify the most powerful features and strategies for leveraging Claude Code's capabilities.
